description:
📈 ALL Systems: https://bit.ly/4kol0y5
🔥 Type with your voice: https://bit.ly/42isnim
🎙️ My Goofy pod: https://bit.ly/46nLQ3U

Top 5 Claude Code Skills From 100k+ GitHub Stars

So, I went through the repos blowing up right now on GitHub and pulled out the five that are genuinely making Claude Code cheaper, faster, and better. We're talking knowledge graphs, web scraping, research automation, design systems, and model routing. And you do not need to be technical to get started with any of these.

*** CORE Software ***
☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/
🚀 AntiGravity: https://antigravity.google/
🌍 Graphify: https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify
🔥 Firecrawl: https://firecrawl.link/jack-roberts
🔌 Firecrawl MCP: https://docs.firecrawl.dev/mcp-server
🤙 AwesomeMD: https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
👀 Claude Router: https://github.com/musistudio/claude-code-router
📝 NotebookLM: https://notebooklm.google.com/
📁 GitHub: https://github.com/
